paths.title: Foundations of Machine Learning
paths.description: Build a solid mathematical and conceptual grounding. Covers linear models, error decomposition, and essential optimization.

paths.title: Deep Learning Architectures
paths.description: Trace the evolution up to modern landmarks. Covers CNNs, initialization, and Memory Networks.

paths.title: The Path to Modern LLMs
paths.description: Map the trajectory from word embeddings to modern generative pre-trained transformers.

paths.title: Reinforcement Learning from Zero to RLHF
paths.description: Construct a journey from basic decision processes to aligning complex models.

paths.title: Computer Vision Essentials
paths.description: Teach how ML systems "see" and map vision features to text.

paths.title: Scaling & Interpretability
paths.description: Explore the bleeding edge of deployment, pruning, and safety mechanisms for advanced users.
